data.content: Clarified Dispatch so the only Swap Agent control is framed as a single global replacement tool, updated the per-step pools copy to redirect all-step replacements back to that shared Dispatch control, and refreshed the layout regression test. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
